chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P No.D-357 of 2016 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objection 2. For hearing of MA 2677/16 3. For hearing of main case 25.02.2019 Mr. Ishrat Ali Lohar Advocate for respondent No.2. -.-.-. No one is present on behalf of the petitioner and no intimation is received. The record reflects that on 04.10.2018 when same was the situation this court put the counsel for the petitioner on notice to satisfy the court about maintainability of this petition and since then neither the petitioner nor his counsel has appeared. Learned counsel for Respondent No.2 has filed a statement alongwith annexures showing that the petitioner has already deposited the amount in terms of impugned order dated 28.01.2016 and has submitted that in view of above, this petition has become infructuous. Be that as it may, since no one is present on behalf of the petitioner and no intimation is received, this petition is dismissed for non-prosecution alongwith listed application. JUDGE JUDGE Ali Haider
